# Doctor's Superia Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![Doctors Superia Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/doctors-superia-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Doctor's Superia Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.

## Card Benefits and Features
CashBack Benefits
  * Get 3 Reward Points for every ₹200 you spend
  * Redeem Reward Points for air miles on more than 20 international airlines or on any major domestic airline.
  * Redeem your [Reward Points](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program) for exciting gifts from an exclusive rewards catalogue, at the applicable redemption rate.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-superia-credit-card "View More")
![Doctors Superia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Enjoy 50% more reward points* when you dine out.
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on transaction between ₹ 400 and ₹ 5,000. Max waiver of ₹ 250 per statement cycle.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/doctors-superia-credit-card "View More")
![Doctors Superia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Rewards Benefits
  * Get 1,000 Reward Points on Joining
  * Earn 1,000 Reward Points Every Year


![Doctors Superia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Protection worth up to ₹ 20 Lakh* against costs arising due to professional negligence.
  * Bodily injury and / or death of any patient caused by error, omission or negligence in professional service rendered
  * Legal costs and Defence expenses on *any one accident up to ₹ 4 Lakh & Deductible ₹ 25,000 for each & every claim
  * Note: This benefit is applicable w.e.f. 1st Sept'19 only. For more details on policy, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-superia-credit-card/hdfc-ergo-general-insurance.pdf)


![Doctors Superia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Additional Benefits
  3. ### Dining Benefits
  4. ### Rewards Validity & Redemption
  5. ### Fees & Charges
  6. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Control via MyCards 
  * One unified platform for managing Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Business Loans.
  * Simple, intuitive interface to monitor and manage all your business expenses.
  * Effortlessly view and redeem reward points with just a click.


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Benefits 
  * **Zero Lost card liability  
**If you lose your Card, report it immediately to [24-hour call centre](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program). After reporting the loss, you have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions made with your card.
  * **Revolving Credit  
**Enjoy Revolving Credit on your [Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) at nominal interest rate, refer Fees and Charges section.
  * **Interest free credit  
**Avail up to 50 interest free days from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant).


![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Dining Benefits 
  * Your HDFC Bank Doctor’s Superia [Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) gives you tons of reasons to dine out. Enjoy 50% more reward points* when you dine. Now every meal will be more rewarding.
  * *50% more Reward Points are offered to the Cardholders only on those transactions which are classified under the 'Restaurant' Merchant Category Code (MCC) as defined by VISA/ MasterCard. Merchant Category Code (MCC) classified under 'Hotel' categories will not qualify for 50% more Reward Points.


![Dining Benefits](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Rewards Validity & Redemption 
  * **Redemption**


Accumulate Reward Points and redeem them for air miles on more than 20 international airlines or on any major domestic airline. (100 AirMiles = 667 Reward Points)   
You can also redeem your Reward Points for exciting gifts from an exclusive rewards catalogue, at the applicable redemption rate. Please [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program) for further details.
Only retail purchases qualify for Reward Points. Cash advance, fees and other charges do not accrue any reward points. Transaction amounts less than ₹ 200 will not accrue any Reward Points.
  * **Reward points validity**


Reward points are valid only for 2 years from the date of accumulation.   
For example: if you receive reward points in May 2015, same will expire in May 2017.
![Rewards Validity & Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining / Annual membership Fee: ₹1,000
  * Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-superia-credit-card/terms-and-conditions.pdf) to view the fees and charges applicable on your Doctor's Superia Credit Card.


**Goods and Services Tax (GST)**
  * Effective 1st July 2017 Service Tax, KKC & SBC of 15% is replaced by Goods & Service Tax (GST) at 18%
  * The applicable GST would be dependent on place of provision (POP) and place of supply (POS). If POP and POS (Point of Sale) is in the same state then applicable GST would be CGST and SGST/UTGST else, IGST.
  * GST For FEE & Charges / Interest transactions Billed on statement date will reflect in next month statement.
  * GST levied will not be reversed on Any dispute on Fee & Charges / interest.


![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/doctors-superia-credit-card/terms-and-conditions.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  How to apply for the Doctors Superia Credit Card?
To **apply for** **the _Doctors Superia Credit Card_ **follow these steps:  

**Existing HDFC Bank Account holders**
  * Download the application form 
  * Fill in your details and drop it off at your local HDFC Bank branch 
  * We'll handle the rest and send the card to your mailing address. 


**Non-HDFC Bank Account holders**
  * Download the Account Opening form 
  * Fill it out, including the **_Doctors Superia Credit Card_** application 
  * Submit it to your nearest HDFC Bank branch, and we'll assist with the rest


###  What is the credit limit of Doctor's Superia Card?
The credit limit of the Doctor's Superia Card will be determined based on various factors such as income and creditworthiness. The specific credit limit will be communicated to you after your application has been processed and approved.
###  Does the Doctor's Superia Card have lounge access?
Yes, the Doctor's Superia Card provides unlimited airport lounge access to 1,000 plus lounges in India for both primary and add-on card members.
###  What are the documents required to apply for a Doctor's Superia Card?
The documents required to apply for the Doctor's Superia Card include proof of identity (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card), proof of address (latest utility bill, passport), and income proof (latest salary slips for salaried individuals, income tax returns for self-employed individuals).
###  What are the benefits of Doctors Superia Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank Doctors Superia Credit Card offers benefits tailored for medical professionals, including accelerated reward points on medical spends, exclusive healthcare privileges, complimentary lounge access, and insurance coverages, making it a valuable financial tool for doctors.
###  What is the Doctor's Superia Card?
The Doctor's Superia Card is a Credit Card exclusively designed for doctors, providing them with a range of benefits and rewards tailored to their needs.
